permissionMode.name: Who may spectate
permissionMode.hint: Controls which tokens a player is allowed to spectate. The GM can always spectate anything. NPC tokens are governed separately by 'Allow spectating NPC tokens'.

allowNpcSpectate.name: Allow spectating NPC tokens
allowNpcSpectate.hint: When on, players may also spectate NPC (non-player-owned) tokens, subject to the mode above and any per-token overrides. Off by default so players only see each other's perspectives. Individual NPCs can still be enabled or disabled from the spectator picker.

maxCameras.name: Maximum simultaneous cameras
maxCameras.hint: The most viewports rendered at once on this client. Additional cameras paginate. Higher values cost more GPU.

autoGrouping.name: Automatic grouping
autoGrouping.hint: When auto-observing, group nearby tokens at the same elevation so viewports are not wasted on split parties.

elevationThreshold.name: Elevation threshold
elevationThreshold.hint: Tokens within this many elevation units are treated as being on the same floor for grouping and 'observe this elevation'.

groupingDistance.name: Grouping distance
groupingDistance.hint: Tokens closer than this (in grid units) are grouped into a single viewport when auto-grouping.

viewportPadding.name: Viewport padding
viewportPadding.hint: Gap in pixels between viewports in the MultiView grid. Streaming mode forces this to zero.

streamingMode.name: Streaming mode
streamingMode.hint: Clean, borderless, minimal-UI output with cinematic transitions — intended for OBS capture.

cameraMode.name: Camera follow mode
cameraMode.hint: How the camera tracks a moving token.

followSpeed.name: Follow speed
followSpeed.hint: Responsiveness of smooth/interpolate camera follow (higher is snappier).

transitionSpeed.name: Transition speed
transitionSpeed.hint: Speed of animated layout / viewport transitions.

deadZone.name: Dead-zone size
deadZone.hint: Fraction of the viewport the token may drift before a dead-zone camera reacts.

performanceMode.name: Performance mode
performanceMode.hint: Trades render cadence and capture resolution against smoothness.

renderScale.name: Render scale
renderScale.hint: Off-screen capture resolution multiplier. Below 1.0 is faster and softer.

frameRateCap.name: Frame-rate cap
frameRateCap.hint: Upper bound on MultiView capture frames per second.

secondaryCadence.name: Secondary camera cadence
secondaryCadence.hint: Recapture secondary (non-primary) viewports every N capture frames. Higher saves GPU.

crossSceneBehaviour.name: When a tracked token changes scene
crossSceneBehaviour.hint: What to do when the token you are following moves to another scene.

debugLogging.name: Debug logging
debugLogging.hint: Verbose console output prefixed with 'Dynamic Spectator'.

profiling.name: Performance profiling
profiling.hint: Collect timing samples and show an FPS / budget readout on the MultiView control bar.

notify.notAllowed: You are not allowed to spectate {name}.
notify.noPlayerToken: That player has no token on this scene.
notify.gmOnly: Only the GM can do that.

picker.title: Spectate a Token
picker.empty: No tokens you can spectate on this scene.
picker.toggleNpc: Toggle whether players may spectate this NPC

crossScene.title: Tracked token changed scene
crossScene.body: A token you are following has moved to another scene. Follow it there?

quickSpectate.name: Quick spectate (hovered token)
quickSpectate.hint: Spectate the hovered / selected / targeted token, or open the picker.

openPicker.name: Open spectator picker
openPicker.hint: Open the searchable list of spectatable tokens.

toggleMultiView.name: Toggle MultiView
toggleMultiView.hint: Open or close the multi-camera overlay.

stopSpectate.name: Stop spectating
stopSpectate.hint: Release the camera and restore your normal vision.

openDashboard.name: Open GM dashboard
openDashboard.hint: Open the GM control centre (GM only).
